overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza. The player emerges from under a concrete overpass into bright sunlight, exploring a commercial area with neon advertisements, distinctive orange architectural structures, trees, benches, and vending machines while interacting with various NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under concrete overpass

events.description: futuristic sedan with illuminated accents drives past on the left side of the walkway
exits the covered overpass area into bright open sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath the overpass, approaching the exit to the open plaza

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past with headlights on
pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk moving away from camera

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass ceiling with linear fluorescent tube lighting running along the length
large illuminated screen displaying pink and white advertisements on the building wall
sleek black vehicle with glowing blue accents and modern aerodynamic design
large distinctive orange architectural archway visible at the end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass with artificial fluorescent lighting. The player walks forward through the covered walkway as a futuristic sedan passes by on the left, approaching the bright exit where a large orange arch structure becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with pedestrian crossing and distinctive architecture

events.description: crossing the street from the sidewalk into the main plaza area
entering the tree-lined section of the plaza with increased pedestrian activity

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and entering the sunlit plaza, navigating around various pedestrians and approaching the orange arch structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple top and beige pants walking across the plaza
bright red sports car parked along the curb with black accents

entered.detail: bright red futuristic sports car with black trim and aerodynamic body
mature trees with dense green foliage planted in large concrete planters
multi-story dark glass building with geometric patterns and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass into bright midday sun, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza dominated by a massive orange arch structure. The player crosses the street, passing a red sports car and entering a tree-lined area with moderate pedestrian traffic and futuristic glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with vending kiosks and seating areas

events.description: approaching the vending machine area with increased pedestrian activity and commercial kiosks
slowing down near the vending machines to observe the surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and approaching a cluster of vending machines, observing NPCs interacting with the environment

notable_agents.action: NPC in white outfit with large backpack using the vending machine interface
group of three NPCs with distinctive red mohawks conversing near the kiosk

entered.detail: teal and silver automated vending kiosk with multiple digital screens and product displays
small blue prefabricated structure with purple neon lighting and glass windows
yellow modular kiosk structure with flat roof and signage
bags of garbage and debris piled on the ground near the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player explores a bustling plaza section featuring colorful vending kiosks in teal, blue, and yellow. NPCs interact with the machines while others congregate in small groups. The area shows signs of urban life with trash piles and scattered debris among the paved walkways and trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded pedestrian plaza under building overhang with seating

events.description: entering the shadow of the building overhang, lighting becomes significantly darker and more contrasted
passing through area with green benches where pedestrians are seated and resting

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza into a shaded area with benches, observing seated pedestrians and the building architecture

notable_agents.action: NPC wearing a hat sitting on a green bench facing away from the camera
pedestrian walking in the distance under the building overhang

entered.detail: dark overhanging building structure creating deep shade over the walkway
modern benches with teal seating and yellow frames where people are resting
floating holographic advertisements and displays under the building canopy
colorful graffiti and street art markings on the pavement surface

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the plaza, the player enters a shaded area beneath a massive building overhang. The lighting shifts to a darker, moodier atmosphere with holographic signage floating overhead. Green benches line the walkway where NPCs sit and rest, and colorful graffiti marks the pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, industrial underpass into the brilliant light of a futuristic urban plaza. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass illuminated by artificial fluorescent lighting, moving forward past a passing futuristic sedan toward a bright exit. As the camera emerges from the shadows into the midday sun, the environment opens up to reveal a wide plaza dominated by a towering orange arch structure. The scene then shifts across a street past a red sports car, finally entering a tree-lined pedestrian area surrounded by sleek glass buildings.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant urban plaza that gradually transitions into a shaded, moody architectural underpass. It begins amidst a bustling open area filled with colorful teal, blue, and yellow vending kiosks where NPCs congregate among scattered debris and paved walkways. As the camera moves deeper into the plaza, the bright daylight fades and the environment shifts toward a darker atmosphere beneath a massive building overhang. The scene then opens up to reveal floating holographic signage overhead and green benches lining the path, before finally passing over colorful graffiti marking the pavement.
